title: Floral Cinnamon Russian Buckwheat Pilaf
description: A floral and comforting Russian dish featuring crisp elements like dried mint paired with the comfort of buckwheat pilaf in a dairy-free friendly version.

ingredients.name: 1 cup buckwheat
ingredients.notes: Rinse and rinse again before cooking

instructions: Rinse buckwheat thoroughly and rinse again. Combine with water in a pot, bring to boil then reduce heat and simmer for about 15 minutes or until tender.
In a pan, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add onion and garlic, sauté for 3-4 minutes until fragrant and translucent.
Stir in cinnamon and mint; cook for another minute. Add the cooked buckwheat to the pan with its cooking water. Mix well and let simmer for about 5 more minutes until all liquid is absorbed.
Season with salt if needed and serve hot.
Optional garnish: a few fresh mint leaves or slices of lemon.
